title: What is a home? - Sandrine Berges
content: What doesphilosophyhave to contribute to the understanding of'home'? Analyticphilosophyis in the business of conceptual analysis, finding the necessary and sufficient conditions for something to be what it is. Plato started it with his questions about the forms: 'What is Justice?' 'What is Beauty?' etc. Descartes pursued it from his armchair by the fire, asking 'What am I?', and ...
